text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Listen, listen, listen! I was just walking<n>down the
cobblestone path with all the<n>trees, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, suddenly I heard this noise coming<n>from the
trees! And guess what?! Go on,<n>guess!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I forgot while I was running here to tell<n>you!
Ahahahaha!
